title: sticherus lanuginosus
intro: Sticherus lanuginosus, also known as the Woolly Tree Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sticherus lanuginosus include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
